title: Solara Active Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Solara Active Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
